nasb.text: They found written in the law how the Lord had commanded through Moses that the sons of Israel should live in booths during the feast of the seventh month.

esv.text: And they found it written in the Law that the Lord had commanded by Moses that the people of Israel should dwell in booths during the feast of the seventh month,

cnv.text: 他們發現律法上記載，耶和華曾藉著摩西吩咐以色列人，要在七月的節期中，住在棚裡，

ccb.text: 当时，他们发现耶和华借摩西吩咐的律法上记载，以色列人要在七月节期期间住在棚子里，
